description: Named marker or bookmark within a slide's expression list, can be referenced by goto() for navigation
utility: Mark a point in a slide for jump-to navigation

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Quoted name of the section to create

arguments.name: shapeRef
arguments.description: Optional reference to shape where section icon is drawn

alternates.description: Create a navigation bookmark without visual indicator
Create section and draw icon next to the referenced shape
